scope_boundary: Only the bounded Project Theseus assistant reference-trace import moves to prototype-backed: a sanitized public-safe fixture records source digests, 19 required reference-trace record types, 27/27 gates, 2,203 VIEA view records, four route-validator required groups, 12 selected VCM pages, zero public training rows, zero external inference calls, no copied raw report, raw VIEA trace, raw assistant text, raw prompt, or private payload, and 11 expected-invalid controls. This does not promote the Project Theseus chapter core claim, prove clean live Project Theseus replay, current runtime state, deployed behavior, route quality, private verifier quality, model quality, benchmark superiority, useful-solution-per-second improvement, learned generation, safety, alignment, transfer, or ASI.
transition_reason: The imported Theseus assistant runtime report has enough public-safe structure to be treated as a bounded prototype-backed reference-trace import rather than a plan or dashboard impression: it preserves a concrete source digest, a 19-record trace skeleton, 27 passing gates, route-validator counts, VCM context counts, public-safety zeros, benchmark-diagnostic blockers, and negative controls for source mismatch, raw/private payload leakage, missing trace records, hidden gate failure, clean-live-replay overclaim, model-quality overclaim, benchmark-headline overclaim, public training rows, external inference calls, and chapter-core promotion. The accepted transition applies only to this import object.
required_artifacts: sanitized public-safe Theseus assistant reference-trace fixture

negative controls for source hash mismatch, raw assistant text copying, private-payload copying, missing required trace record, hidden gate failure, clean-live-replay overclaim, model-quality overclaim, benchmark-headline overclaim, public training rows, external inference calls, and chapter-core promotion
negative_results: source report hash mismatch is rejected
raw assistant text copying is rejected
missing required reference-trace record types are rejected
benchmark-headline or benchmark-superiority overclaim is rejected
downgrade_triggers: the sanitized fixture no longer validates against the recorded source digests, trace-record list, gate counts, route-validator counts, VCM context counts, public-safety boundary, or non-claim boundary

a source mismatch, raw assistant text copy, private-payload copy, missing trace record, hidden gate failure, clean-live-replay overclaim, model-quality overclaim, benchmark-headline overclaim, public training row, external inference call, or chapter-core promotion is accepted as valid

the import is described as clean live Project Theseus replay, current runtime state, deployment evidence, route-quality evidence, private verifier-quality evidence, model-quality evidence, benchmark superiority, useful-solution-per-second evidence, learned-generation evidence, safety evidence, alignment evidence, transfer evidence, ASI evidence, or chapter-core evidence
future public dependency policy requires archived raw report publication and this record remains a digest-only sanitized summary
promotion_burden: Move beyond this bounded prototype-backed import only after a public-safe archived Theseus report bundle or clean live replay is available, the raw/private publication boundary is resolved, every trace hop can be externally inspected or replayed, route and verifier quality are separately evaluated, benchmark measurements are headline-eligible rather than diagnostic, residuals and non-claims are preserved, and independent review is recorded with a separate accepted transition.
limitations: raw Theseus report, raw VIEA trace, raw assistant text, raw prompts, private paths, checkpoints, candidate code, score labels, and training rows are not copied into this public repository
